tasks.title: Project Setup and Repository Initialization
tasks.description: Initialize the Lantern project repository with proper structure, licensing, and basic configuration files
tasks.details: Create GitHub repository at chatt-state/lantern with Apache-2.0 license. Set up Node.js 22 + TypeScript project structure with package.json, tsconfig.json, .gitignore, and README.md. Initialize basic folder structure: src/, docs/, docker/, tests/. Configure ESLint and Prettier for code quality. Set up GitHub Actions for CI/CD pipeline targeting GHCR for Docker images.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify repository structure, validate package.json dependencies, ensure TypeScript compilation works, test CI/CD pipeline builds successfully

subtasks.title: GitHub Repo Creation and Licensing
subtasks.description: Create the GitHub repository at chatt-state/lantern and add Apache-2.0 license file.
subtasks.details: Log into GitHub under chatt-state organization, create new repository named 'lantern', select Apache License 2.0 during initialization or add LICENSE file via 'Add file > Create new file' with license template[1][2]. Commit changes with descriptive message.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify repository exists at chatt-state/lantern, confirm LICENSE file contains Apache-2.0 text and is displayed on repo main page[2].

subtasks.title: Node.js/TypeScript Project Initialization
subtasks.description: Set up Node.js 22 + TypeScript project with essential config files: package.json, tsconfig.json, .gitignore, README.md.
subtasks.details: Run 'npm init -y', set engines to Node.js ^22, install TypeScript dev deps (typescript @types/node), create tsconfig.json with strict mode and target ES2022, add .gitignore for node_modules/.env/dist, initialize README.md with project overview.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate package.json has correct Node version, run 'npx tsc --noEmit' to check TypeScript config, ensure git status is clean.

subtasks.title: Folder Structure and Code Quality Setup
subtasks.description: Initialize folder structure (src/, docs/, docker/, tests/) and configure ESLint + Prettier.
subtasks.details: Create directories: src/, docs/, docker/, tests/. Install ESLint, Prettier, @typescript-eslint/parser/eslint-plugin dev deps. Generate .eslintrc.json with TypeScript rules, .prettierrc with standard config, add scripts to package.json for lint/format.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run 'npm run lint' and 'npm run format' without errors, verify folder structure with 'ls -la', check Prettier/ESLint configs parse sample TS file.

subtasks.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline Configuration
subtasks.description: Set up GitHub Actions workflows for CI/CD targeting GHCR for Docker images.
subtasks.details: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml for lint/test/build on push/PR, docker-build-push.yml for building/pushing Lantern image to GHCR on main/tag. Use Node 22 runner, include steps for install deps, lint, test, Docker build with alpine base.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger workflow on push/PR, verify jobs complete successfully, check GHCR for pushed images, validate build artifacts.

tasks.title: Database Schema Design and Migration System
tasks.description: Design PostgreSQL database schema for multi-tenant support with institutions, users, departments, and audit logging
tasks.details: Create PostgreSQL 16 schema with tables: institutions, users, departments, group_mappings, audit_logs, oauth_clients, sessions. Implement row-level security for multi-tenant isolation. Set up migration system using node-pg-migrate. Include indexes for performance on user lookups, audit queries, and tenant isolation. Design encrypted credential storage with AES-256-GCM fields.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for migration scripts, validate schema constraints, test row-level security isolation, performance test with sample data

subtasks.title: Design Core Database Tables
subtasks.description: Create PostgreSQL schema definitions for institutions, users, departments, group_mappings, audit_logs, oauth_clients, and sessions tables with multi-tenant fields like institution_id.
subtasks.details: Define tables with appropriate data types, primary/foreign keys, constraints, and initial columns for encrypted credentials using BYTEA for AES-256-GCM. Include tenant_id in all relevant tables for RLS support[1][2].
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate table creation, check constraints, foreign key integrity, and basic insert/select operations

subtasks.title: Implement Row-Level Security Policies
subtasks.description: Enable RLS on all core tables and create policies for multi-tenant isolation based on institution_id and user roles.
subtasks.details: Use ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; and CREATE POLICY with conditions like (institution_id = current_setting('app.current_institution_id')::uuid). Create functions for setting tenant context[1][6].
subtasks.testStrategy: Test cross-tenant isolation by attempting unauthorized access, validate policy enforcement for different user roles

subtasks.title: Set Up node-pg-migrate System
subtasks.description: Initialize node-pg-migrate project and create initial migration files for core schema deployment.
subtasks.details: Install node-pg-migrate, configure database connection, generate migration files for tables from subtask 1, implement up/down functions with proper error handling and validation[1].
subtasks.testStrategy: Run migrations up/down cycles, verify schema matches design, test rollback functionality

subtasks.title: Create Performance Indexes
subtasks.description: Design and implement indexes for user lookups, audit queries, tenant isolation, and common query patterns.
subtasks.details: Create composite indexes on (institution_id, user_id), (created_at, institution_id) for audit_logs, unique indexes on oauth_client identifiers, partial indexes for active sessions[1][2].
subtasks.testStrategy: Measure query performance before/after indexing, validate index usage with EXPLAIN ANALYZE, test with realistic data volumes

subtasks.title: Implement Encrypted Credential Storage
subtasks.description: Add AES-256-GCM encryption for sensitive fields in users and oauth_clients tables with key management.
subtasks.details: Create encryption functions using pgcrypto pgp_sym_encrypt, store IV/nonce with ciphertext in BYTEA columns, implement key rotation strategy, add encryption triggers or application-level encryption[1].
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate encryption/decryption roundtrip, test with various data sizes, verify encryption at rest, test key rotation without data loss

subtasks.title: Develop Testing and Validation Scripts
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite for schema, RLS, migrations, indexes, and encryption functionality.
subtasks.details: Write pgTAP tests for RLS policies, migration validation scripts, performance benchmarks, encryption verification, multi-tenant isolation tests with sample data for institutions/users/departments[1][2].
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated CI/CD pipeline tests, load testing with 1000+ records per tenant, security penetration testing for RLS bypass attempts

tasks.title: Fastify Server Foundation with Health Check
tasks.description: Set up Fastify HTTP server with TypeScript, environment configuration, and basic health check endpoint
tasks.details: Initialize Fastify server with TypeScript support, request validation schemas, and error handling. Implement environment variable loading with validation for PORT, BASE_URL, DATABASE_URL, LOG_LEVEL. Create /health endpoint returning server status and database connectivity. Set up structured logging with configurable levels. Configure CORS and security headers.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for server startup, health check endpoint validation, environment variable validation, database connection testing

subtasks.title: Fastify Server Initialization with TypeScript
subtasks.description: Initialize Fastify HTTP server instance with TypeScript support, request validation schemas, error handling, CORS, and security headers
subtasks.details: Create main server file using Fastify with TypeScript. Configure logger, register @fastify/cors and @fastify/helmet plugins. Set up global error handler and request schema validation. Use fastify-plugin pattern for encapsulation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for server startup, CORS headers validation, security headers presence, error handler response format

subtasks.title: Environment Configuration and Validation
subtasks.description: Implement environment variable loading and validation for PORT, BASE_URL, DATABASE_URL, LOG_LEVEL with structured logging setup
subtasks.details: Use 'dotenv' and 'envalid' libraries to load and validate environment variables. Create config module exporting validated values. Integrate with Fastify logger using pino with level from LOG_LEVEL. Handle missing variables gracefully.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for env validation with mock process.env, integration tests for invalid/missing vars, logger level configuration verification

subtasks.title: Health Check Endpoint Implementation
subtasks.description: Create /health endpoint returning server status and database connectivity using fastify-healthcheck plugin
subtasks.details: Register fastify-healthcheck plugin with custom checks for database connectivity. Add database health check promise using DATABASE_URL from config. Return JSON with status, uptime, and DB status. Include healthcheck script support.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for /health endpoint with healthy/unhealthy DB states, response schema validation, probe script execution

tasks.title: Azure Entra ID OIDC Authentication
tasks.description: Implement Azure Entra ID OIDC authentication flow with support for both single-tenant and multi-tenant modes
tasks.details: Implement OIDC client using openid-client library. Create /auth/login redirect to Azure, /auth/callback handler for OIDC response, and /auth/logout for session cleanup. Support both single-tenant (specific tenant ID) and multi-tenant (common endpoint) modes via AZURE_TENANT_ID configuration. Implement session management with secure cookies. Handle Azure AD group claims extraction.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock Azure OIDC responses for unit tests, integration tests with test Azure tenant, validate token parsing and session creation

subtasks.title: Setup OIDC Client with openid-client Library
subtasks.description: Initialize and configure the openid-client library for Azure Entra ID OIDC authentication supporting dynamic tenant endpoints.
subtasks.details: Install openid-client, create Issuer instance using AZURE_TENANT_ID env var to build discovery URL (common or specific tenant), configure client with client_id, client_secret, redirect_uris. Handle both single-tenant (tenant-specific) and multi-tenant (common) modes dynamically.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test client initialization for both tenant modes, validate discovery document fetching and client metadata parsing

subtasks.title: Implement Login, Callback, and Logout Endpoints
subtasks.description: Create Fastify routes for /auth/login (redirect to Azure), /auth/callback (handle OIDC response), and /auth/logout (session cleanup).
subtasks.details: Login: generate authorization URL with openid-client and redirect. Callback: exchange code for tokens, validate ID token. Logout: clear session cookie and redirect to Azure logout endpoint if configured. Use secure HTTP-only cookies for session storage.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock OIDC issuer responses, test full auth flow with valid/invalid codes, verify redirects and token exchange

subtasks.title: Implement Single vs Multi-Tenant Mode Handling
subtasks.description: Configure OIDC discovery and auth endpoints based on AZURE_TENANT_ID environment variable for single-tenant or multi-tenant support.
subtasks.details: If AZURE_TENANT_ID is 'common', use https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/v2.0/.well-known/openid-configuration. For specific tenant ID, use https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant_id}/v2.0/.well-known/openid-configuration. Make tenant selection configurable and validate audience claims accordingly.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test discovery URL construction for both modes, validate token audience and issuer claims match expected tenant

subtasks.title: Implement Secure Session Management
subtasks.description: Create secure session handling using HTTP-only, secure cookies with user data and token claims from OIDC response.
subtasks.details: Store minimal user data (sub, tenant, roles) in signed/encrypted session cookie using fastify-cookie or iron-session. Set secure, httpOnly, sameSite=strict flags. Implement session middleware for protected routes. Add session expiry matching token TTL.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test cookie security flags, session signing/verification, expiry handling, and protection against tampering

subtasks.title: Extract and Process Azure AD Group Claims
subtasks.description: Parse Azure AD group membership claims from ID/access tokens and prepare for RBAC and department mapping.
subtasks.details: Configure Azure app registration to include groups claim (groupMembershipClaims). Parse groups array from token claims. Store in session and database for Task 5/7 integration. Handle group claim overflow via _claim_names/_claim_sources if needed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock tokens with various group claim formats, validate parsing and storage, test overflow scenarios

tasks.title: Microsoft Graph API Integration for Group Sync
tasks.description: Integrate Microsoft Graph API to sync Azure AD groups and map them to Lantern departments
tasks.details: Implement Microsoft Graph client using @azure/msal-node for authentication. Create service to call GET /me/memberOf on user login to retrieve Azure AD groups. Implement group mapping logic using configurable mapping table (azure_group -> department + role). Auto-create departments for unmapped groups. Handle Graph API rate limiting and error scenarios. Store group sync results in database.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock Microsoft Graph API responses, test group mapping logic with various scenarios, validate department auto-creation, test rate limiting handling

subtasks.title: MSAL Authentication Setup
subtasks.description: Configure @azure/msal-node for Microsoft Graph API authentication with Azure AD app registration
subtasks.details: Register Azure AD app with Graph permissions (Group.Read.All, User.Read), implement MSAL confidential client with client secret, tenant ID, and app ID. Create auth service for token acquisition on user login.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for token acquisition, mock Azure AD responses, validate token scopes and expiration handling

subtasks.title: Graph API Client for Group Membership
subtasks.description: Create service to call GET /me/memberOf endpoint to retrieve user's Azure AD groups on login
subtasks.details: Implement Graph client using @azure/msal-node auth provider. Add retry logic for transient errors. Parse group data (id, displayName) and store in session/cache. Handle pagination if needed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Graph API responses with various group sets, test parsing and caching, validate endpoint permissions

subtasks.title: Group-to-Department Mapping Logic
subtasks.description: Implement configurable mapping from Azure groups to Lantern departments and roles
subtasks.details: Create database table for mapping (azureGroupId -> departmentId + role). Load mapping on startup. Add service to lookup user departments/roles from groups. Store results in user session and database.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test mapping with valid/invalid groups, multiple group matches, fallback logic, database persistence

subtasks.title: Auto-Department Creation and Error Handling
subtasks.description: Auto-create Lantern departments for unmapped groups and implement rate limiting/error handling
subtasks.details: Check if unmapped group exists as department, create if not. Implement exponential backoff for Graph rate limits (429 errors). Log errors and sync failures. Add sync status tracking in database.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test auto-creation flow, simulate rate limiting (429 responses), error recovery, validate department creation and logging

tasks.title: OAuth 2.1 + PKCE Server Implementation
tasks.description: Implement OAuth 2.1 authorization server with PKCE support for Claude Desktop/Code authentication
tasks.details: Implement OAuth 2.1 server following RFC 6749 and RFC 7636 (PKCE). Create endpoints: /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server (metadata), /oauth/register (dynamic client registration), /oauth/authorize (authorization with PKCE), /oauth/token (token exchange/refresh), /oauth/revoke. Use HS256 for JWT signing with configurable TTL. Implement refresh token rotation. Store OAuth clients and authorization codes in database.
tasks.testStrategy: OAuth 2.1 compliance testing, PKCE flow validation, JWT token verification, refresh token rotation testing, client registration validation

subtasks.title: OAuth Metadata Endpoint
subtasks.description: Implement /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server endpoint per OAuth 2.1 discovery spec
subtasks.details: Create Fastify route returning JSON metadata including issuer, authorization_endpoint, token_endpoint, jwks_uri, scopes_supported, response_types_supported per RFC 8414 and OAuth 2.1 requirements[1][4]
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate JSON structure against OAuth 2.1 discovery spec, test all required metadata fields present and correct

subtasks.title: Dynamic Client Registration
subtasks.description: Implement /oauth/register endpoint for dynamic client registration
subtasks.details: Create POST endpoint accepting client_name, redirect_uris, grant_types, response_types. Store clients in database with generated client_id, client_secret (for confidential clients), issue client_id immediately[4]
subtasks.testStrategy: Test client creation with valid/invalid parameters, verify database storage, test client read/update endpoints

subtasks.title: Authorize Endpoint with PKCE
subtasks.description: Implement /oauth/authorize endpoint supporting PKCE authorization code flow
subtasks.details: Handle GET requests with client_id, redirect_uri, scope, response_type=code, code_challenge, code_challenge_method=S256. Validate PKCE parameters, store authorization codes with code_challenge in database, redirect with code[1][2]
subtasks.testStrategy: Test full PKCE flow with valid code_challenge/verifier, test invalid PKCE rejection, test scope validation

subtasks.title: Token Endpoint Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement /oauth/token endpoint for authorization_code and refresh_token grants
subtasks.details: Support grant_type=authorization_code with code_verifier validation, grant_type=refresh_token. Issue JWT access_token (HS256), refresh_token with rotation. Validate client authentication for confidential clients[1][2]
subtasks.testStrategy: Test token exchange with valid PKCE verifier, test refresh token rotation, test invalid grant rejection

subtasks.title: Refresh Token Rotation
subtasks.description: Implement refresh token rotation and revocation mechanism
subtasks.details: On refresh_token grant, invalidate old refresh_token, issue new one. Store token pairs in database with usage flags. Implement token family tracking for rotation[1]
subtasks.testStrategy: Test rotation issues new token and invalidates old, test multiple refresh attempts, test token family cleanup

subtasks.title: JWT Signing and Database Storage
subtasks.description: Implement HS256 JWT signing and OAuth data persistence
subtasks.details: Configure HS256 signing with configurable TTL from env vars. Create database schemas for oauth_clients, authorization_codes, access_tokens, refresh_tokens. Implement token introspection support[1][4]
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate JWT signature and claims, test TTL expiration, verify database CRUD operations for all OAuth entities

subtasks.title: Token Revoke Endpoint
subtasks.description: Implement /oauth/revoke endpoint per RFC 7009
subtasks.details: Handle POST requests with token (access_token or refresh_token), token_type_hint, client authentication. Mark tokens as revoked in database, support both access and refresh token revocation[1]
subtasks.testStrategy: Test revocation of valid tokens, test revoked token rejection on refresh/access, test invalid token handling

tasks.title: Role-Based Access Control System
tasks.description: Implement role-based access control with Institution Admin, Department Admin, and Member roles
tasks.details: Create RBAC middleware for Fastify routes. Define role hierarchy: Institution Admin (full access), Department Admin (department-scoped), Member (tool usage only). Implement permission checking for API endpoints and UI routes. Create user role assignment logic based on Azure AD group mappings. Handle role inheritance and department membership. Implement session-based authorization for web UI and Bearer token auth for API.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for permission checking, role assignment validation, test access control across different user types and departments

subtasks.title: Develop RBAC Middleware for Fastify
subtasks.description: Create Fastify middleware plugin to extract user roles and permissions from JWT/session for route protection
subtasks.details: Register as Fastify plugin using fastify-auth-middleware pattern. Implement preHandler hook to validate auth and attach user context (roles, department). Support both session cookies and Bearer tokens.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test middleware registration, auth extraction, error handling for invalid/missing tokens

subtasks.title: Define Role Hierarchy and Permissions
subtasks.description: Implement role hierarchy with Institution Admin (full), Department Admin (scoped), Member (tools only)
subtasks.details: Create role enum and permission matrix. Institution Admin inherits all permissions. Department Admin scoped by department_id. Member limited to tool:use. Support role inheritance logic.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test hierarchy resolution, permission inheritance, department scoping for different role combinations

subtasks.title: Implement Permission Checking Logic
subtasks.description: Create permission checker for API endpoints and UI routes with resource/action validation
subtasks.details: Build checkPermission(user, action, resource, department?) function. Integrate into middleware. Support UI route patterns and API resource paths. Return 403 for denied access.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test all role/permission combinations across API/UI routes, department scoping edge cases

subtasks.title: Implement Azure AD Group Role Assignment
subtasks.description: Map Azure AD groups to roles/departments and assign on user login from Task 5 sync
subtasks.details: Create configurable mapping table (group_id -> role + department). Auto-assign primary role based on highest hierarchy. Handle multiple group memberships with inheritance. Store in user_roles table.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test mapping logic with mock Graph API groups, multiple overlapping groups, unmapped group fallback

subtasks.title: Implement Session and Token Authorization
subtasks.description: Add session-based auth for web UI and Bearer token auth for API with RBAC integration
subtasks.details: Web UI: Secure session cookies with role/department data. API: JWT Bearer tokens with embedded permissions. Refresh token rotation support. Integrate with Task 4 OIDC flow and Task 6 OAuth.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests for UI session flow, API token flow, cross-task integration, token expiry/refresh

tasks.title: MCP Proxy Infrastructure
tasks.description: Build MCP (Model Context Protocol) proxy system to forward requests to MCP server containers
tasks.details: Implement MCP proxy at /v1/:server/mcp endpoint. Validate Bearer tokens, check user permissions for requested server/tools. Forward requests to MCP server containers via HTTP. Implement tool allowlist checking per department. Add request/response logging for audit trail. Handle MCP server errors and timeouts. Implement tool caching with 5-minute TTL to reduce upstream load.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock MCP server responses, test proxy forwarding, validate permission checking, test tool allowlist enforcement, audit logging verification

subtasks.title: Implement Proxy Endpoint Routing
subtasks.description: Set up Fastify route for /v1/:server/mcp endpoint to handle MCP requests and route to appropriate handlers.
subtasks.details: Register dynamic route using Fastify's route params for :server. Parse incoming MCP JSON-RPC requests. Add basic request parsing middleware. Ensure compatibility with MCP protocol over HTTP.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test route registration, parameter extraction for server name, MCP request parsing validation

subtasks.title: Implement Token and Permission Validation
subtasks.description: Validate Bearer tokens from Authorization header and check user permissions for the requested server and tools using RBAC system.
subtasks.details: Extract and validate JWT Bearer token. Integrate with Task 7 RBAC middleware. Query user roles/departments from session/DB. Verify access to specific :server and tools. Return 401/403 on failure.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock tokens for different roles, test permission grants/denials for servers/tools, edge cases like expired tokens

subtasks.title: Implement MCP Server Forwarding
subtasks.description: Forward validated MCP requests to target server containers via HTTP, preserving MCP JSON-RPC format and headers.
subtasks.details: Discover/lookup MCP server container URL by :server param (from config/DB). Use HTTP client (axios/fetch) to proxy POST requests. Preserve MCP headers like Mcp-Session-Id. Handle streaming if needed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock upstream MCP servers, verify request forwarding fidelity, test with real MCP JSON-RPC payloads

subtasks.title: Implement Tool Allowlist Enforcement
subtasks.description: Check requested tools against per-department allowlists before forwarding, blocking unauthorized tools.
subtasks.details: Parse MCP request for tool names. Fetch department allowlist from DB/config based on user dept. Validate each tool in request. Reject requests with disallowed tools (403). Log violations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with allowed/blocked tools per dept, mixed requests, empty allowlists, dynamic tool lists

subtasks.title: Implement Tool Caching with 5-min TTL
subtasks.description: Cache MCP tool responses with 5-minute TTL to reduce load on upstream servers, keyed by user/server/tool/params.
subtasks.details: Use Redis or in-memory cache (e.g., lru-cache). Cache successful tool call responses only. Key: userId+server+tool+hash(params). TTL 5min. Bypass cache for non-idempotent or mutating tools.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify cache hits/misses, TTL expiration, cache invalidation, memory usage under load

subtasks.title: Add Error Handling, Timeouts and Audit Logging
subtasks.description: Handle upstream MCP errors/timeouts gracefully, implement comprehensive request/response logging for audits.
subtasks.details: Set HTTP timeouts (30s). Catch/translate upstream errors to standard MCP error responses. Log all requests/responses to audit DB/file (user, server, tools, status, timing). Add rate limiting.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate timeouts/errors from mocks, verify logging completeness, audit trail verification, error response formats

tasks.title: M365 MCP Server Implementation
tasks.description: Create Microsoft 365 MCP server for Mail, Calendar, Files, Teams, and Directory access
tasks.details: Build standalone MCP server container for M365 integration. Implement Microsoft Graph OAuth 2.0 flow for user consent. Create MCP tools for: Mail (read/search/send), Calendar (read/write events), Files (OneDrive/SharePoint access), Teams (channel messages), Directory (user lookup). Use @azure/msal-node for authentication. Implement credential encryption with AES-256-GCM. Handle token refresh automatically.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each MCP tool, integration tests with Microsoft Graph API, credential encryption/decryption validation, OAuth flow testing

subtasks.title: Container and Dockerfile Setup
subtasks.description: Build standalone Docker container for M365 MCP server with all dependencies.
subtasks.details: Create Dockerfile using Node.js 22 base image, copy package.json and src/, install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, @azure/msal-node, Fastify. Expose MCP HTTP endpoint on port 3001 with StreamableHTTPServerTransport. Include multi-stage build for production.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test Docker build success, container startup, exposed ports, and basic MCP health check.

subtasks.title: MS Graph OAuth 2.0 Flow Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement OAuth 2.0 user consent flow using @azure/msal-node for Microsoft Graph access.
subtasks.details: Configure MSAL PublicClientApplication for authorization code flow with PKCE. Create endpoints for /oauth/authorize redirect and /oauth/callback token exchange. Store tokens securely and implement user consent UI if needed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test full OAuth flow end-to-end, token acquisition, and Graph API permission scopes.

subtasks.title: Mail MCP Tool Implementation
subtasks.description: Create MCP tool for Mail operations: read, search, and send emails via Microsoft Graph.
subtasks.details: Define MCP tools with Zod schemas for listMessages, searchMessages, sendMail. Use Graph API /me/messages, /me/sendMail endpoints. Implement pagination and attachment handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each operation, integration tests with mock Graph responses.

subtasks.title: Calendar MCP Tool Implementation
subtasks.description: Create MCP tool for Calendar: read events and create/update/delete events.
subtasks.details: Define MCP tools for getEvents, createEvent, updateEvent, deleteEvent using Graph /me/events. Support recurrence, attendees, and time zones.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test event CRUD operations, recurrence patterns, and conflict detection.

subtasks.title: Files MCP Tool Implementation
subtasks.description: Create MCP tool for OneDrive/SharePoint files: list, upload, download, share.
subtasks.details: Implement tools for listDrives, listChildren, upload, download, createShareLink using Graph /me/drive and /sites endpoints. Handle large files with upload sessions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test file operations across OneDrive and SharePoint, permission handling.

subtasks.title: Teams MCP Tool Implementation
subtasks.description: Create MCP tool for Teams channel messages: read, send, reply.
subtasks.details: Define tools for listChannelMessages, sendMessage, replyToMessage using Graph /teams/{id}/channels/{id}/messages. Support mentions and attachments.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for message CRUD in test Teams channels.

subtasks.title: Directory MCP Tool Implementation
subtasks.description: Create MCP tool for Directory user lookup and group membership.
subtasks.details: Implement getUsers, getUser, getUserGroups using Graph /users and /me/memberOf. Add search by displayName/email and pagination.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test user search accuracy and group membership retrieval.

subtasks.title: Credential Encryption and Token Refresh
subtasks.description: Implement AES-256-GCM encryption for credentials and automatic token refresh.
subtasks.details: Use crypto module for AES-256-GCM encryption of client secrets/tokens. Integrate MSAL token cache with automatic refresh. Add key rotation support and secure env var handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate encryption/decryption roundtrip, token refresh triggers, and expiry handling.

tasks.title: Audit Logging System
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all MCP requests and administrative actions
tasks.details: Create audit logging middleware to capture: user ID, department, server/tool name, timestamp, latency, success/error status, optional request/response hashes. Store in audit_logs table with proper indexing. Implement log retention policies. Create audit log viewer with filtering by user, department, date range, server. Support CSV export functionality. Ensure logs are immutable after creation.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate audit log creation for all request types, test filtering and export functionality, verify log immutability, performance test with large log volumes

subtasks.title: Implement Audit Logging Middleware
subtasks.description: Create middleware that intercepts all MCP requests and administrative actions to capture required audit data including user ID, department, server/tool name, timestamp, latency, success/error status, and optional request/response hashes.
subtasks.details: Use Express.js middleware or equivalent to wrap request handlers. Calculate latency with process.hrtime(). Generate SHA-256 hashes for request/response bodies if enabled. Ensure middleware is non-blocking and handles errors gracefully. Integrate with existing auth context for user/department info.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test middleware with mocked requests for all capture fields. Integration test with real endpoints to verify log generation on success/error paths. Performance test latency impact under high load.

subtasks.title: Database Schema and Storage for Audit Logs
subtasks.description: Design and implement audit_logs table with proper schema, indexing, and initial data insertion from middleware.
subtasks.details: Create table with columns: id (UUID primary key), user_id, department_id, server_name, tool_name, timestamp (indexed), latency_ms, status (success/error), request_hash, response_hash, metadata JSONB. Add composite indexes on (user_id, timestamp), (department_id, timestamp), (server_name, timestamp). Use transactions for atomic inserts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate schema with sample inserts. Test index performance with EXPLAIN ANALYZE on common queries. Verify data integrity with concurrent inserts.

subtasks.title: Audit Log Viewer UI with Filtering and Export
subtasks.description: Build web interface for viewing audit logs with filters by user, department, date range, server, and CSV export capability.
subtasks.details: Create /audit-logs route with React/Vue frontend. Implement API endpoints GET /api/audit-logs with query params for filtering, pagination. Use SQL WHERE clauses with indexed fields. Add CSV export endpoint generating headers and data rows. Secure with department-scoped RBAC.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E tests for filtering scenarios and CSV export validation. Load test with 10k+ records. Verify department isolation prevents cross-department log viewing.

subtasks.title: Log Retention Policies and Immutability
subtasks.description: Implement automatic log retention/deletion policies and ensure logs cannot be modified after creation.
subtasks.details: Add cron job/service for retention: DELETE FROM audit_logs WHERE timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' (configurable). For immutability: use WORM pattern with append-only inserts, hash chain verification, or database triggers preventing UPDATE/DELETE on audit_logs. Encrypt logs at rest if required.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test retention job removes old logs correctly without affecting recent ones. Attempt unauthorized modifications via SQL direct access and verify prevention. Validate hash chain integrity after bulk inserts.

tasks.title: Web UI Dashboard and Navigation
tasks.description: Build server-rendered web interface for user dashboard and navigation using Fastify templates
tasks.details: Create server-rendered HTML templates using Fastify's view engine (handlebars or similar). Implement main dashboard showing user info, department membership, available tools. Create navigation structure for settings, department management, admin panels. Implement responsive design with basic CSS. Add session-based authentication checks for all UI routes. Include logout functionality.
tasks.testStrategy: UI rendering tests, session authentication validation, responsive design testing across devices, navigation flow testing

subtasks.title: Template Engine Setup
subtasks.description: Configure Fastify view engine (Handlebars, EJS, or Point-of-View) for server-rendered HTML templates with layout support.
subtasks.details: Install and register @fastify/view or point-of-view plugin. Set up views directory structure with base layout template including head, navigation, and responsive CSS framework (e.g., Tailwind or Bootstrap). Configure partials for header, footer, navigation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify template rendering with sample data, check layout consistency across pages, validate CSS loading and responsive breakpoints.

subtasks.title: Dashboard Page Implementation
subtasks.description: Create main dashboard template displaying user info, department membership, and available tools with responsive design.
subtasks.details: Develop dashboard.hbs template using session data: user profile, departments list from DB, tools based on permissions. Implement responsive grid layout with CSS. Add data fetching hooks to populate user/department info from database queries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Render tests with mock user sessions, validate data display accuracy, responsive design checks on mobile/tablet/desktop viewports.

subtasks.title: Navigation and Auth Integration
subtasks.description: Implement navigation structure for settings/department/admin panels with session-based authentication guards and logout.
subtasks.details: Create route handlers for /dashboard, /settings, /departments, /admin with preHandler auth hooks checking valid sessions. Build shared navigation partial with conditional links based on user roles. Add /logout route clearing session cookie. Ensure all UI routes redirect unauthenticated users to login.
subtasks.testStrategy: Authentication flow tests (access/redirect), navigation link validation, logout session cleanup verification, role-based access control.

tasks.title: Institution Admin Panel
tasks.description: Build comprehensive admin interface for institution-wide management and configuration
tasks.details: Create admin panel at /settings/admin with sections: Overview (metrics dashboard), Departments (list/create/configure), Members (search/reassign), Servers (enable/disable), Tool Access (allowlists), Audit Log (viewer/export). Implement Azure AD group mapping UI for configuring group -> department mappings. Add member search and role assignment functionality. Include server access control toggles per department.
tasks.testStrategy: Admin functionality testing, group mapping UI validation, member management operations testing, audit log export verification

subtasks.title: Overview Metrics Dashboard
subtasks.description: Develop metrics dashboard displaying key institution-wide statistics and KPIs
subtasks.details: Create Overview section at /settings/admin/overview with charts for active users, department counts, server usage, tool access stats, recent audit events. Use Chart.js or Recharts for visualization. Fetch data from aggregated API endpoints. Implement real-time updates with WebSockets or polling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all metrics display correctly, test data accuracy against database, validate responsive design and refresh functionality

subtasks.title: Departments Management Interface
subtasks.description: Build CRUD interface for managing departments including Azure AD group mapping
subtasks.details: Implement Departments section with list view, create/edit forms, delete confirmation. Add Azure AD group mapping UI showing group ID -> department mappings table. Support bulk operations and search/filter. Integrate with /api/departments and /api/group-mappings endpoints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test full CRUD operations, validate Azure AD group mapping persistence and UI accuracy, verify department isolation

subtasks.title: Members Search and Role Assignment
subtasks.description: Implement advanced member search with reassign and role management functionality
subtasks.details: Create Members section with search by name/email/department, bulk selection, reassign to departments, role assignment (admin/member). Display current department/role badges. Support export to CSV. Use debounced search with /api/members/search endpoint.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate search accuracy and performance, test role reassignment permissions, verify bulk operations and CSV export

subtasks.title: Servers Access Control Toggles
subtasks.description: Build server enable/disable controls with department-specific permissions
subtasks.details: Develop Servers section listing all servers with global toggle and per-department access matrix. Use toggle switches with confirmation dialogs. Implement real-time updates via WebSockets. Integrate with /api/servers/:id/access/:department endpoint.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test toggle functionality across departments, verify permission enforcement, validate real-time sync across sessions

subtasks.title: Tool Access Allowlists Configuration
subtasks.description: Create tool access management interface with department-level allowlists
subtasks.details: Build Tool Access section showing tools per server per department. Implement allowlist editor with search/add/remove. Support inheritance override toggles. Use nested tables or tabs for organization. Connect to /api/tool-access endpoints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify allowlist CRUD operations, test inheritance logic, validate department-specific overrides and permission checks

subtasks.title: Audit Log Viewer and Export
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive audit log viewer with filtering and CSV export capabilities
subtasks.details: Create Audit Log section with advanced filters (date range, user, department, server, action). Paginated table view with sortable columns. Add CSV export button with all visible data. Implement log immutability indicators. Use /api/audit-logs with query params.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test all filter combinations, validate pagination and sorting, verify CSV export accuracy and large dataset performance

tasks.title: Department Management and Tool Access Control
tasks.description: Implement department-level administration and tool access control configuration
tasks.details: Create department admin interface at /settings/department for Department Admins. Implement tool allowlist management per department and server. Create API endpoints for managing department tool access: GET/PUT /api/departments/:id/tool-access/:server. Add member management within department scope. Implement tool access inheritance and override logic. Create department-scoped audit log viewing.
tasks.testStrategy: Department admin permission testing, tool allowlist functionality validation, member management within department scope, audit log filtering by department

subtasks.title: Department Admin UI Interface
subtasks.description: Create the department admin interface at /settings/department accessible only to Department Admins with department overview, navigation, and consistent admin layout.
subtasks.details: Build UI using existing admin panel patterns with breadcrumbs, section overview, three-column grid layout for responsiveness. Include department list, search, and basic stats. Protect route with RBAC middleware checking Department Admin role.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test route access for Department Admin vs other roles, UI responsiveness across devices, breadcrumb navigation, and data loading for departments.

subtasks.title: Tool Allowlist API and UI Management
subtasks.description: Implement tool allowlist management UI and API endpoints for per-department and per-server configuration with inheritance and override logic.
subtasks.details: Create GET/PUT /api/departments/:id/tool-access/:server endpoints with JSONSchema validation. Build UI table with edit/new forms, inheritance indicators, and override toggles. Implement backend logic for allowlist storage/retrieval with department-server scoping.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate API responses for different departments/servers, test inheritance/override scenarios, UI form submission end-to-end, permission enforcement.

subtasks.title: Department Member Management
subtasks.description: Add member management functionality within department scope including add/remove/view members with role assignments.
subtasks.details: Extend department UI with member table showing users, roles, join date. Implement add/remove APIs scoped to department. Integrate with Azure AD group mappings and RBAC for Department Admin permissions. Handle bulk operations and search/filtering.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test member CRUD within department boundaries, cross-department isolation via RLS, role assignment validation, UI search/filter functionality.

subtasks.title: Department-Scoped Audit Log Viewing
subtasks.description: Implement department-scoped audit log viewer in the admin interface with filtering and pagination.
subtasks.details: Add audit logs tab/section to department UI. Query audit_logs table with RLS filters for department scope. Implement pagination, search by user/action/date, and export options. Use efficient indexes for performance on large log sets.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify log filtering shows only department events, performance with 10k+ records, pagination accuracy, different user permission levels.

tasks.title: Docker Compose Deployment Configuration
tasks.description: Create Docker Compose setup for easy deployment with PostgreSQL, Lantern gateway, and M365 MCP server
tasks.details: Create docker-compose.yml with services: postgres (PostgreSQL 16), lantern (main gateway), m365-mcp (M365 MCP server). Create Dockerfile for Lantern using Node.js 22 Alpine base. Include .env.example with all required environment variables documented. Set up proper networking, volumes for data persistence, and health checks. Configure container restart policies and resource limits (2 CPU / 4 GB RAM minimum).
tasks.testStrategy: Docker Compose deployment testing, container health check validation, environment variable configuration testing, data persistence verification

subtasks.title: Define docker-compose.yml Services
subtasks.description: Create the main docker-compose.yml file defining all three services: postgres (PostgreSQL 16), lantern (main gateway), and m365-mcp (M365 MCP server).
subtasks.details: Include service configurations with images, ports, environment variables from .env, depends_on for startup order, restart: unless-stopped policy, and deploy resources limits (cpus: '2', memory: 4G).
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate YAML syntax, test docker compose config, ensure services start without errors

subtasks.title: Create Lantern Dockerfile
subtasks.description: Build Dockerfile for the Lantern gateway service using Node.js 22 Alpine base image.
subtasks.details: Use multi-stage build if needed, copy package.json and install dependencies, build TypeScript, expose port, set HEALTHCHECK, optimize for production with .dockerignore.
subtasks.testStrategy: Build Dockerfile successfully, verify image size under 500MB, test container healthcheck passes

subtasks.title: Configure .env, Networking, and Volumes
subtasks.description: Set up .env.example with documented environment variables, define networks, volumes for data persistence, and healthchecks for all services.
subtasks.details: Create custom bridge network 'lantern-network', postgres volume 'postgres_data', .env.example with POSTGRES_PASSWORD, DB credentials, API keys, ports; add healthchecks like pg_isready for postgres and curl for services.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify env vars load correctly, test volume persistence after restart, validate healthchecks and network connectivity between services

tasks.title: Multi-Tenant Support and Institution Registration
tasks.description: Implement multi-tenant architecture for shared hosted deployment model
tasks.details: Implement MULTI_TENANT=true mode with institution registration flow. Create institution registration API accepting Azure tenant ID and verified domain. Implement tenant-scoped row-level security in all database queries. Add institution isolation middleware ensuring users can only access their institution's data. Create institution management for shared hosting. Implement tenant-aware OAuth client registration.
tasks.testStrategy: Multi-tenant isolation testing, institution registration flow validation, row-level security verification, tenant data separation testing, cross-tenant access prevention validation

subtasks.title: Implement Multi-Tenant Mode Flag Handling
subtasks.description: Add configuration logic to enable MULTI_TENANT=true mode and initialize tenant context throughout the application.
subtasks.details: Parse MULTI_TENANT env var on startup, set global tenant mode, add tenant ID to request context, implement fallback to single-tenant behavior when disabled. Update app bootstrapper.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for mode detection, integration tests verifying single vs multi-tenant behavior switching

subtasks.title: Develop Institution Registration API
subtasks.description: Create POST /api/institutions endpoint accepting Azure tenant ID and verified domain for new institution onboarding.
subtasks.details: Validate Azure tenant ID format and domain ownership, create institution record with unique tenant_id, generate institution-specific configs, return API keys and endpoints. Add rate limiting.
subtasks.testStrategy: API contract testing, mock Azure validation, end-to-end registration flow with database assertions

subtasks.title: Implement Row-Level Security Across All Queries
subtasks.description: Add tenant-scoped RLS policies to every database table and update all queries to include institution_id filtering.
subtasks.details: Create institution_id column on all relevant tables with defaults, implement database policies enforcing current_tenant filter, audit all existing queries for RLS compliance, add query builder middleware.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cross-tenant data isolation testing, SQL injection prevention validation, comprehensive query coverage testing

subtasks.title: Build Institution Isolation Middleware
subtasks.description: Create Express middleware that enforces institution-scoped access for all authenticated requests.
subtasks.details: Extract institution_id from user session/Azure claims, validate against request path params and query filters, block cross-institution access with 403, log isolation violations for audit.
subtasks.testStrategy: Middleware unit tests, integration tests simulating cross-tenant access attempts, performance impact benchmarking

subtasks.title: Create Institution Management Dashboard
subtasks.description: Build admin interface for managing institutions in shared hosting environment at /admin/institutions.
subtasks.details: List all institutions with metrics (users, usage, servers), enable/disable institutions, manage custom domains, view tenant-specific configs, export institution data, implement bulk operations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Admin UI functionality testing, role-based access control validation, data export accuracy verification

subtasks.title: Implement Tenant-Aware OAuth Client Registration
subtasks.description: Extend OAuth server to create tenant-scoped client registrations with institution isolation.
subtasks.details: Modify /oauth/register to scope clients to institution_id, partition client secrets by tenant, implement tenant-aware token issuance, update authorization server metadata per tenant, ensure RLS compliance.
subtasks.testStrategy: OAuth compliance testing per tenant, cross-tenant client isolation validation, token introspection endpoint testing
